'''鈭歯-k-dh-sh''' ('''kanakdheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedel|wedel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedel|wedel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-k-dh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanakdheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
